meta.description: LT_OO_VAHDR + LT_OO_VAITM JOIN → Aging 계산 → TT_OO_LITE

sql:
SELECT
  H.VBELN,
  I.POSNR,
  H.AUART,
  H.AUDAT,
  LEFT(CAST(H.AUDAT AS VARCHAR), 6)            AS AUDAT_YM,
  H.VKORG,
  H.VTWEG,
  H.SPART,
  H.KUNNR,
  I.MATNR,
  I.MATKL,
  I.ARKTX,
  I.MEINS,
  H.WAERK,
  I.KWMENG                                     AS ORD_QTY,
  H.NETWR                                      AS ORD_AMT,
  DAYS_BETWEEN(H.AUDAT, CURRENT_DATE)          AS ELAPSED_DAYS,
  CASE
    WHEN DAYS_BETWEEN(H.AUDAT, CURRENT_DATE) <= 30  THEN '030'
    WHEN DAYS_BETWEEN(H.AUDAT, CURRENT_DATE) <= 60  THEN '060'
    WHEN DAYS_BETWEEN(H.AUDAT, CURRENT_DATE) <= 90  THEN '090'
    ELSE '90+'
  END                                          AS AGING_GRP
FROM LT_OO_VAHDR H
INNER JOIN LT_OO_VAITM I
  ON H.VBELN = I.VBELN
WHERE I.ABGRU = ''
